query: What Con Edison commercial customer service class pays the highest demand charge in Manhattan, New York City?
final_answer:
Assuming you mean the current approved Con Edison commercial tariffs for Manhattan/NYC, the **highest demand charge** I found is for **SC-12 - Multiple Dwellings Space Heating Low Tension Service [NYC]**. Its tariff shows a demand charge of **$60.19/kW-month**, plus a **$1.37/kW-month adjustment**, for **$61.56/kW-month total**.  
**Source:** OpenEI IURDB Con Edison commercial tariff records returned by `get_utility_tariffs` for EIA ID 4226 (Consolidated Edison Co-NY Inc), with tariff source link in the record to Con Edison’s electric tariff PDF: `https://lite.coned.com/_external/cerates/documents/elecPSC10/electric-tariff.pdf`.
